# SORT(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  sort — sort lines of text files

## SYNOPSIS
  sort [-r] [-u] [file]

## DESCRIPTION
Sorts lines of text. Can pipe from or to other commands.

## OPTIONS
  -r  reverse order
  -u  unique lines only
  -n  numeric sort

## EXAMPLES
  sort /etc/passwd
  cat /var/log/nexus.log | sort -r
  cat users.txt | sort -u

## SEE ALSO
  uniq, grep, awk
